lines.speaker: Shop assistant
lines.text: Hello, bold adventurer! Can I interest you in some swords?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I'm okay for swords right now.

lines.speaker: Shop assistant
lines.text: Come back if you need any.

sections.title: Redeeming combat adventure path rewards in free-to-play

lines.speaker: Shop assistant
lines.text: Hello, bold adventurer! Can I interest you in some swords?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have this voucher for completing the combat Adventure Path, it says to come talk to you about claiming my Adventure Path reward.

lines.speaker: Shop assistant
lines.text: I do, but you need to be on a members world for me to give you the reward. Maybe there is something else I can help you with.

sections.title: Redeeming combat adventure path rewards in members

lines.speaker: Shop assistant
lines.text: Hello, bold adventurer! Can I interest you in some swords?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have this voucher for completing the combat Adventure Path, it says to come talk to you about claiming my Adventure Path reward.

lines.speaker: Shop assistant
lines.text: I will be able to give you your reward when you have some space for it.

lines.speaker: Shop assistant
lines.text: Can I help you with anything else?

lines.speaker: Shop assistant
lines.text: Why yes, here is one of our finest swords.

lines.speaker: Shop assistant
lines.text: I also sell other weapons if you are interested.
